final:
module counter_16bit (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [15:0] count
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 16'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
